title: Fortune Notebook
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Money flows where attention goes. This 151-page fortune notebook turns abundance from a vague hope into a daily practice you can see, measure, and feel shift over time.

Who it's for:
- Manifestation and Law-of-Attraction practitioners
- Lottery players, dreamers, and gratitude-journal believers
- Anyone rebuilding their relationship with money after debt or scarcity seasons
- Spiritual journalers ready for something more intentional than a blank notebook

What's inside:
- Daily prompts for gratitude, intention, money-mindset, and luck-noticing
- Lucky number, dream, and synchronicity logs
- Wealth visualization pages: define the life you're calling in
- Weekly review: what came, what shifted, what to release
- Affirmation library and abundance script templates
- Year-end reflection: how your fortune actually changed

This isn't a magic spell. It's the simple, repeatable habit that almost every wealthy person credits when asked. Five minutes a day. Pen on paper. Mind aligned with money.

Start writing the next year of your fortune. Order today.
categories: BISAC: BODY, MIND & SPIRIT / New Thought
